data.title: HOTELEX 2026 returns to Shanghai from March 30 to April 2, 2026, at NECC, bringing together hospitality professionals.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, it was announced that HOTELEX Shanghai will be held at the National Exhibition & Convention Center (NECC) from March 30 to April 2, 2026. This event will provide a premier opportunity for hospitality professionals to network, cooperate, and influence the industry's direction.
Kato wants to deepen talks with other parties
India could struggle to procure enough alternative crude quickly if it curtails Russian oil imports to avoid tariff penalties, Moody’s says.

data.title: HOTELEX Shanghai 2026 to be largest trade show yet, spanning 400,000 sqm on March 30-April 2.
data.description: HOTELEX Shanghai, the leading trade show for hospitality and foodservice industries in Asia, is scheduled to take place from March 30 to April 2, 2026, at the National Exhibition and Convention Center (NECC). This year, the event will offer an extensive showcase across 400,000 square meters, showcasing the latest trends and innovations in the sector.
BOJ offers to lend govt debt on spot morning offer
Kato regrets US stacked levies due to administrative lapse
According to Moody’s, continued Russian oil imports at the expense of a 50% U.S. tariff on Indian goods could lower GDP growth by 0.3 points from the projected 6.3% for FY25-26.
Kato seeking both growth and fiscal health in compiling budget
Japanese Finance Minister Katsunobu Kato speaks in Tokyo
A sharp tariff gap with other Asia-Pacific countries could undermine India's recent success in attracting investment, Moody's says.

data.title: GitHub improves user experience by consolidating SSO banners into a unified format, benefitting organizations needing SSO.
data.description: GitHub has recently introduced a new system by consolidating single sign-on (SSO) banners into a single, dismissible format, aiming to improve the user experience for organizations that mandate SSO authentication. This update is significant as it simplifies the process for users, leading to a more seamless login procedure. By centralizing the SSO banners, GitHub has reduced clutter and improved efficiency, ultimately enhancing the overall usability of the platform. This change is expected to benefit organizations using GitHub for collaborative projects, making it easier for members to access and contribute to repositories.

data.title: NVIDIA's new Grace Hopper Superchip boosts XGBoost 3.0 for terabyte-scale datasets, improving speed and cost efficiency.
data.description: NVIDIA has launched the Grace Hopper Superchip, which boosts XGBoost 3.0 for enhanced processing of terabyte-scale datasets. This development improves speed and cost-effectiveness, catering to the rising demand for handling large datasets efficiently.

data.title: Sui debuts passkey system for seamless Web3 access via biometric authentication, simplifying onboarding securely.
data.description: Sui has rolled out a new passkey system that allows users to securely access Web3 applications through biometric authentication. This technology streamlines the onboarding process and enhances security measures. This initiative aims to make it more convenient for users to interact with Web3 apps while ensuring protection.

data.title: GPT-5 transforms GitHub Copilot in public preview, enriching code quality and reasoning. Available to all paid plans.
data.description: OpenAI has introduced GPT-5 for GitHub Copilot in a public preview, enhancing the code quality and reasoning abilities. The model is now accessible to all paid Copilot plans, aiming to support developers in their coding tasks.

data.title: Microsoft incorporates OpenAI GPT-5 to boost AI capabilities across platforms, benefiting users with enhanced reasoning.
data.description: Microsoft has recently incorporated OpenAI's GPT-5 into its range of products, boosting reasoning capabilities for users across various sectors. This integration is set to benefit consumers, developers, and enterprises through tools such as Microsoft 365 Copilot and Azure AI Foundry. Overall, this move aims to enhance the user experience by leveraging the advanced capabilities of GPT-5 within Microsoft's offerings.

data.title: Hackers target AI's problem-solving instincts, exposing vulnerabilities in multimodal reasoning models. Learn how to defend against these attacks.
data.description: Cyber attackers are taking advantage of artificial intelligence's problem-solving abilities, creating new areas of vulnerability in multimodal reasoning models. These attacks target the system's instincts, leading to the introduction of new attack surfaces. Understanding how these vulnerabilities are exploited and implementing proper defenses is crucial. Stay informed on the latest developments to protect against these threats.

data.title: ARM64 Hosted Runners now available on GitHub for Linux and Windows in public repositories, boosting developer efficiency.
data.description: GitHub has unveiled the introduction of ARM64 hosted runners for Linux and Windows in public repositories, aiming to boost performance and enhance build efficiency for developers. This move provides developers with improved tools to work on their projects, with an emphasis on performance optimization. This new feature is expected to significantly benefit developers, as it allows for a more streamlined and efficient development process.

data.title: Paxos settles NYDFS compliance matters, pays $26.5M fine, ending Binance deal.
data.description: Paxos recently settled with the NYDFS over past compliance concerns, leading to a $26.5 million fine and the end of its previous collaboration with Binance.

data.title: Animoca Brands & ProvLabs join forces to launch NUVA for tokenized real-world assets, utilizing Provenance Blockchain's $15.7B RWA pool.
data.description: Animoca Brands has formed a partnership with ProvLabs to collaborate on the development of NUVA, a platform dedicated to tokenizing real-world assets. They will be utilizing the Provenance Blockchain's $15.7 billion pool of Real-World Assets (RWA) for this initiative. This partnership aims to create a marketplace for tokenized assets, offering a new avenue for investment opportunities.
